user.title: Stade de France
user.description: Track Stade de France events and get notified before each one. You can choose the notification service and lead time in the options.

abort.already_configured: Stade de France is already configured.

data_description.notify_service: The notify service to call (e.g. notify.mobile_app_iphone). Leave empty to disable sending.
data_description.lead_days: Number of days before the event (0 = same day).
data_description.notify_time: Time of day the notification is sent.
